description_long: This house features a modern, multi-level design with a flat roof and a mix of geometric forms, creating a visually dynamic structure. The exterior is predominantly finished in light gray and white tones, with occasional accents of yellow and dark gray, adding contrast and visual interest. Large windows and glass doors are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and a connection to the outdoors. The house includes multiple terraces and open spaces, some of which are partially covered, providing outdoor living areas. The main entryway is set back and features a wide, glass-paneled door, complemented by a paved approach and minimalistic landscaping. The overall architectural style is contemporary, with clean lines, open layouts, and a focus on functional outdoor-indoor integration.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large asymmetrical windows, and a mix of light gray, white, and yellow accents. Features include terraces, open spaces, and a prominent glass entryway.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main facade with large windows, a glass entryway, and a paved approach, highlighting the geometric forms and color accents.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the structure, multiple levels, and terraces, with visible outdoor spaces and a mix of solid and open areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displays additional terraces, a large open area, and more asymmetrical window placements, emphasizing the house's open layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows secondary entrances, smaller windows, and the integration of outdoor spaces with the main structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Wide glass-paneled door with a paved approach, minimalistic and recessed entry, no porch or columns
